exam_format: Computer-adaptive (question-level adaptive); available online via Pearson VUE OnVUE platform or at Pearson VUE test centers worldwide. Review and edit up to 3 answers per section allowed.
exam_price_notes: $275 USD at test centers and online. Rescheduling fees apply within 60 days of appointment.

testing_centers.notes: GMAT Focus and EA available at Pearson VUE test centers worldwide. GMAT Focus also available as an online proctored exam via Pearson VUE OnVUE. Schedule at mba.com or mba.com/exams/ea.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must exactly match the name used during registration. For online exams: webcam, microphone, and a private, quiet room required.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, scratch paper, books, or unauthorized electronic devices permitted. Scratch paper and pencils provided at test centers; online whiteboard available for online exams. GMAT Focus: candidates may choose the order of the three sections. GMAT Focus ScoreSelect: send only the scores you choose to programs. EA: sections must be taken in fixed order. No section-order choice.
renewal_options: GMAT exam scores are not certifications requiring renewal. GMAT Focus scores are valid for 5 years from the test date. EA scores are valid for 5 years from the test date. Candidates may retake exams (within retake limits) to obtain higher or more recent scores.

retake_policy.notes: GMAT Focus Edition: once every 16 calendar days; max 5 attempts per rolling 12-month period; max 8 lifetime attempts. Executive Assessment: once per calendar year; max 2 lifetime attempts.

domains.name: Data Insights (data sufficiency, multi-source reasoning, graphics interpretation, table analysis, two-part analysis)

official_study_resources.title: GMAT Focus Official Starter Kit + Practice Exams 1 & 2
official_study_resources.notes: Free. Two full-length official practice exams via mba.com.

official_study_resources.notes: Paid bundle of four additional full-length practice tests.

official_study_resources.notes: Print + online question bank. Focus Edition-specific guide available.

official_study_resources.notes: Free sample questions and preparation guide available at mba.com/exams/ea.
